final:
// // Synchronous reset functionality; counter decrements on rising edge of clock when reset is low
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
      count <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
      if (count == 4'b1111) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
      end else begin
        count <= count + 1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Synchronous reset functionality; counter decrements on rising edge of clock when reset is low
